findings.title: Empty change set blocks validation of PM-01 acceptance criteria
findings.details: Initial review observed 0 changed files in PR compare state.
findings.resolution: Pushed commit df28050 with task-plan/spec/log updates before second review.

findings.title: Include explicit acceptance-criteria traceability in reviewable artifacts
findings.details: Add auditable mapping from PM-01 acceptance criteria to concrete artifacts/sections.

findings.title: No reviewable code changes in PR scope
findings.details: PR updates documentation/process artifacts only; no code file types changed.
findings.resolution: PM-01 is a project planning approval task; no source code changes are required by this issue.

findings.title: Acceptance criteria not verifiable via code review artifacts
findings.details: Improve traceability from criteria to implementation work items.
findings.resolution: Added PM-01.acceptance_traceability and decision_log references to auditable artifacts.

findings.title: No reviewable source-code changes in PR scope
findings.details: Final review confirms this PR is documentation/planning-only and contains no code-file extensions under the code-review rules.
findings.resolution: PM-01 is a project planning approval task; executable implementation is tracked in downstream INF/APP/CICD tasks.
